creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 232104
Original patch upgrading to 1.22.2 + FOPT

BTW, I just rebased your initial patch with an old (uncommitted) oneliner which used to give better results: it just adds FOPT=${FCFLAGS} to MAKE_ENV.

But now, I'm unable to run `make test': it produces an error in py38-pluggy and py38-pytest, but I do not understand why…
